requirement_topic.en: Customs, Import Duties, and DGI / Douanes Processing
requirement_topic.zh: 海关、进口税及DGI/海关处理
requirement_topic.zht: 海關、進口稅及DGI/海關處理

summary.en: Importation of wireless and telecom terminal equipment into Cameroon is subject to customs duties and taxes administered by the Direction Générale des Impôts (DGI) and the Direction Générale des Douanes (customs authority). Cameroon is a member of the CEMAC (Communauté Économique et Monétaire de l'Afrique Centrale) customs union; CEMAC common external tariff (CET) rates apply to imports from outside the zone. Telecom and electronic equipment typically attracts import duties (common external tariff) plus VAT (TVA) on the CIF value. An ART homologation certificate must be presented at customs for wireless and telecom terminal equipment before clearance. Customs documentation requires a commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading or airway bill, certificate of origin (Form A or relevant FTA certificate where applicable), and the ART homologation certificate. Significant duties apply and must be budgeted by the Cameroonian importer.
summary.zh: 向喀麦隆进口无线和电信终端设备须缴纳由税务总局（DGI）和海关总局（海关当局）管理的关税和税费。喀麦隆是中非经济货币共同体（CEMAC）关税联盟成员；对区外进口商品适用CEMAC共同对外关税（CET）税率。电信和电子设备通常须就CIF价值缴纳进口关税（共同对外关税）及增值税（TVA）。无线和电信终端设备须在清关前向海关提交ART同质化证书。报关文件须包括商业发票、装箱单、提单或空运提单、原产地证书（在适用时为普惠制表格A或相关自贸协定证书）及ART同质化证书。喀麦隆进口商须在预算中纳入相当金额的关税。
summary.zht: 向喀麥隆進口無線和電信終端設備須繳納由稅務總局（DGI）和海關總局（海關當局）管理的關稅和稅費。喀麥隆是中非經濟貨幣共同體（CEMAC）關稅聯盟成員；對區外進口商品適用CEMAC共同對外關稅（CET）稅率。電信和電子設備通常須就CIF價值繳納進口關稅（共同對外關稅）及增值稅（TVA）。無線和電信終端設備須在清關前向海關提交ART同質化證書。報關文件須包括商業發票、裝箱單、提單或空運提單、原產地證書（在適用時為普惠制表格A或相關自貿協定證書）及ART同質化證書。喀麥隆進口商須在預算中納入相當金額的關稅。

standards_or_laws: CEMAC Common External Tariff (CET) — applicable to imports from outside CEMAC
Cameroon VAT (TVA) on CIF import value
Direction Générale des Douanes (Cameroun) — customs clearance procedures
Direction Générale des Impôts (DGI) — tax administration
ART homologation certificate required at customs for wireless/telecom equipment
Customs documentation: commercial invoice, packing list, B/L or AWB, certificate of origin, ART certificate

summary.en: Chinese exports to Cameroon are subject to standard export customs procedures in China (customs declaration, export licence where required, certificate of origin from CCPIT or China Customs). From the Chinese export side, no specific Cameroonian import duty equivalent exists domestically. The Cameroonian importer bears all in-country duties and taxes. China and Cameroon do not have a bilateral free trade agreement that reduces applicable CEMAC CET rates for Chinese goods.
summary.zh: 中国对喀麦隆出口须遵循中国标准出口海关程序（报关、所需出口许可、中国国际贸易促进委员会或中国海关出具的原产地证书）。从中国出口角度看，国内不存在与喀麦隆进口税对应的等效要求。喀麦隆进口商承担所有在国税费。中国与喀麦隆之间没有可降低中国商品适用CEMAC共同对外关税税率的双边自由贸易协定。
summary.zht: 中國對喀麥隆出口須遵循中國標準出口海關程序（報關、所需出口許可、中國國際貿易促進委員會或中國海關出具的原產地證書）。從中國出口角度看，國內不存在與喀麥隆進口稅對應的等效要求。喀麥隆進口商承擔所有在國稅費。中國與喀麥隆之間沒有可降低中國商品適用CEMAC共同對外關稅稅率的雙邊自由貿易協定。

standards_or_laws: Certificate of origin (CCPIT Form A or China Customs CO for GSP where applicable)
No China–Cameroon bilateral FTA as of 2026

gap.en: Full gap: Cameroonian customs duties (CEMAC CET) plus TVA on CIF value represent a significant landed cost addition with no Chinese domestic equivalent. The ART homologation certificate must be presented at customs — failure to present results in seizure or refusal of clearance. No China–Cameroon FTA exists to reduce duty rates. The Cameroonian importer must budget for CEMAC CET rates plus TVA and ensure all documentation (including ART homologation certificate) is available at the time of customs clearance.
gap.zh: 完全差距：喀麦隆海关关税（CEMAC共同对外关税）加上就CIF价值征收的TVA，构成显著的到岸成本增加项，在中国境内没有对应等效项。ART同质化证书须在海关出示——无法出示将导致货物被扣押或拒绝放行。中喀之间不存在可降低税率的自由贸易协定。喀麦隆进口商须在预算中纳入CEMAC共同对外关税税率加TVA，并确保在清关时备妥所有文件（包括ART同质化证书）。
gap.zht: 完全差距：喀麥隆海關關稅（CEMAC共同對外關稅）加上就CIF價值徵收的TVA，構成顯著的到岸成本增加項，在中國境內沒有對應等效項。ART同質化證書須在海關出示——無法出示將導致貨物被扣押或拒絕放行。中喀之間不存在可降低稅率的自由貿易協定。喀麥隆進口商須在預算中納入CEMAC共同對外關稅稅率加TVA，並確保在清關時備妥所有文件（包括ART同質化證書）。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CEMAC common external tariff duties plus TVA apply to wireless and telecom equipment imported into Cameroon from China. The ART homologation certificate is a mandatory customs clearance document. No China–Cameroon FTA reduces applicable rates. Engage the Cameroonian importer and a licensed customs broker to calculate applicable CEMAC CET HS-code rates, TVA, and total landed cost before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 从中国进口的无线和电信设备进入喀麦隆须缴纳CEMAC共同对外关税加TVA。ART同质化证书是必备的海关清关文件。中喀之间无自贸协定可降低适用税率。在发货前，须委托喀麦隆进口商和持牌报关行，依据适用CEMAC共同对外关税的HS编码税率、TVA计算总到岸成本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 從中國進口的無線和電信設備進入喀麥隆須繳納CEMAC共同對外關稅加TVA。ART同質化證書是必備的海關清關文件。中喀之間無自貿協定可降低適用稅率。在發貨前，須委託喀麥隆進口商和持牌報關行，依據適用CEMAC共同對外關稅的HS編碼稅率、TVA計算總到岸成本。
